name: vora
description: Discord-based competitive matchmaking system for Mobile Legends

scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run test:deployment && npm test && npm run build
scripts.test: node --import tsx --test tests/operationalControl.test.ts tests/playerAdministration.test.ts tests/playerVerification.test.ts tests/communityModeration.test.ts tests/divisionResolver.test.ts tests/divisionRoles.test.ts tests/teamBalancer.test.ts tests/teamFormationEngine.test.ts tests/matchmakingCandidateMapper.test.ts tests/squadModel.test.ts tests/squadLifecycle.test.ts tests/squadResultVerification.test.ts tests/verifiedResultProcessor.test.ts tests/readyCheckUi.test.ts tests/readyCheckExpiration.test.ts tests/resultLifecycleExpiration.test.ts tests/matchHistoryUi.test.ts tests/guildSetup.test.ts tests/guildAccess.test.ts tests/permissionPolicy.test.ts tests/developmentSimulation.test.ts tests/queueModelIndexes.test.ts tests/voiceQueue.test.ts tests/squadVoice.test.ts tests/ratingCalculator.test.ts tests/queueDiscipline.test.ts tests/disputeInbox.test.ts tests/disputeResolution.test.ts tests/resultEvidence.test.ts tests/integritySanctions.test.ts tests/moderationAudit.test.ts tests/communityBot.test.ts tests/communityLaunch.test.ts tests/seasonFoundation.test.ts tests/seasonControlUi.test.ts tests/seasonProgression.test.ts tests/seasonProgressionUi.test.ts tests/seasonRewardRoles.test.ts

author: Raphael Schäublin
